notes: Level 6 manual review override shard for spell indexes 0-4 in generated discovery row order.
This shard keeps formatting drift separate from mechanics findings and records validator-shape workarounds only where they affect review safety.

arcane-gate::choice_or_mode.issue: Two portal spaces and the one-sided open-facing choice are flattened into prose; runtime lacks paired portal endpoints and facing-choice fields.
arcane-gate::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked portal endpoint and one-sided facing fields.
arcane-gate::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linkedPortalEndpoints and portalFacing data.

arcane-gate::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The detector matched Bonus Action text for changing portal facing; this is an action-sustain mechanic, not an attack or save modifier.

arcane-gate::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: Each portal requires a Large unoccupied ground space, with one endpoint within range and one within 10 feet of the caster; runtime only has generic point targeting.
arcane-gate::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: Add paired endpoint eligibility, size, occupancy, and range fields.

arcane-gate::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The caster can use a Bonus Action to change the open-side facing; runtime lacks a granted bonus action or portal-facing update operation.
arcane-gate::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Add grantedActions entry for changing portal facing.

arcane-gate::movement_or_repositioning.issue: The detector matched the portals hovering inches from the ground; that is portal placement/orientation, not creature or object movement.

arcane-gate::terrain_or_surface.issue: Portal placement requires Large unoccupied ground spaces, hovering inches from the ground, perpendicular orientation, and one-sided open direction; runtime lacks typed surface/orientation data.
arcane-gate::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal surface, hover height, orientation, and one-sided opening fields.

arcane-gate::vision_light_sound.issue: The portals glow and their mist blocks sight, but runtime only preserves those properties in prose.
arcane-gate::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal visibility and sight-blocking fields.

arcane-gate::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Open-side entry teleports creatures or objects out of the other portal as if adjacent, while the nonportal side has no effect; this linked travel rule is not typed.
arcane-gate::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bidirectional linked portal travel fields with open-side entry restrictions.

blade-barrier::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Initial, enter-area, and end-turn Dexterity saves now all use half-damage outcomes with once-per-turn recurring triggers.
blade-barrier::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.
blade-barrier::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE effects for immediate, on_enter_area, and on_end_turn_in_area triggers.

blade-barrier::terrain_or_surface.issue: Difficult Terrain is represented, but Three-Quarters Cover is only preserved in utility prose and the terrain effect uses a validator-safe Square workaround because terrain effects do not accept Wall shapes.
blade-barrier::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add typed cover fields and align terrain area shapes with wall-shaped areas.
blade-barrier::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cover data and extend terrain effect area support for Wall shapes.

blade-barrier::created_object_or_structu.issue: The created blade wall is now marked as a creation utility, but cover/barrier properties are still not first-class runtime fields.
blade-barrier::created_object_or_structu.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-wall cover and barrier property fields.

blade-barrier::environmental_change.issue: The wall's Difficult Terrain behavior is represented as a TERRAIN effect; the remaining cover detail is tracked under terrain_or_surface and created_object_or_structure.

bones-of-the-earth::choice_or_mode.issue: The target can choose to fail the lift save, and a restrained creature can choose Strength or Dexterity for escape; runtime lacks voluntary save failure and escape-ability choice fields.
bones-of-the-earth::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add voluntary save-failure and escape-check choice fields.
bones-of-the-earth::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarSaveChoice and pillarEscapeChoice data.

bones-of-the-earth::attack_or_save_modif.issue: The lift save, optional failure, ceiling/obstacle damage branch, and escape check are all distinct branches but runtime only has one generic damage save.
bones-of-the-earth::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pillar lift, crush, and escape save/check branches.

bones-of-the-earth::terrain_or_surface.issue: Pillar count, dimensions, and rubble measurements are represented, but ground width eligibility, Medium-or-smaller creature targeting, rubble difficult terrain lifecycle, and clearing requirements are not typed.
bones-of-the-earth::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pillar placement and rubble terrain lifecycle fields.
bones-of-the-earth::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarPlacement and rubbleTerrain data.

bones-of-the-earth::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible ground targeting, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

bones-of-the-earth::object_stats_or_dama.issue: Each pillar's AC 5, 30 hit points, crumble-to-rubble behavior, and clearing time are not represented as object stats and aftermath data.
bones-of-the-earth::object_stats_or_dama.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object stats, destruction, and rubble cleanup fields.

bones-of-the-earth::status_or_state_chan.issue: Restrained-by-obstacle, Strength-or-Dexterity action escape, and move-or-fall outcome after escape are not represented as status and movement outcomes.
bones-of-the-earth::status_or_state_chan.recommendedTemplateChange: Add obstacle restraint, escape choice, and post-escape outcome fields.

bones-of-the-earth::environmental_change.issue: Stone pillars bursting from the ground, obstacle-limited height, and rubble difficult terrain after destruction are not fully represented as environmental state changes.
bones-of-the-earth::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pillar creation, obstacle interaction, and rubble state fields.

chain-lightning::choice_or_mode.issue: Runtime now allows four total targets, but it does not distinguish the first target from up to three secondary targets within 30 feet, nor enforce one bolt per target.

chain-lightning::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Dexterity save, half-damage outcome, 10d8 Lightning damage, and four-target maximum are represented for this pass.
chain-lightning::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional save field required for this pass.
chain-lightning::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by DAMAGE save effect and maxTargets 4.

chain-lightning::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible first-target selection, already represented by lineOfSight targeting.

chain-lightning::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: The detector matched the word 'launch' in the damage prose; this is not a ward, alarm, or trigger mechanic.

circle-of-death::choice_or_mode.issue: The only choice is the point that anchors the 60-foot sphere, already represented by area targeting.

circle-of-death::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Constitution save, half-damage outcome, 8d8 Necrotic damage, and +2d8 slot scaling are now represented.
circle-of-death::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by corrected DAMAGE effect and scaling.
